subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Shuhaday-i-Yazd va Isfahan (Tablet on the Martyrs of Yazd and Isfahan)
subcodes.first_line: In this enlightened age, which is the century of the Almighty God, by the effulgence of the Sun of Reality, the lights of civilization are diffused
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این عصر انوار که قرن عظیم حضرت پروردگار است و از پرتو شمس حقیقت انوار
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
